message:
Restore underscore prefixes on variables used only behind cfg-gated tracing macros

The previous commit (ce0a9a17) removed underscore prefixes from
variables like _reward, _worker_id, _source_label, _old_time, _error,
_err, and _reason, treating them as "used in tracing macros." However,
these tracing macros are gated behind #[cfg(feature = "tracing-
integration")] or similar feature flags. When compiled without the
feature (the default for many CI/test configurations), these variables
are genuinely unused and the underscore prefix is required to suppress
compiler warnings.

Restoring the underscore prefixes on all affected variables:
- src/runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs: reward -> _reward
- src/runtime/scheduler/worker.rs: worker_id -> _worker_id (2 sites)
- src/runtime/waker.rs: source_label -> _source_label
- src/lab/runtime.rs: old_time -> _old_time, error -> _error
- src/messaging/jetstream.rs: err -> _err
- src/distributed/recovery.rs: reason -> _reason

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
